behavior: Every repository-root entry has a current owner, and maintained state, contracts, documentation, examples, and generated outputs live at their narrowest canonical owner.
scope: Complete repository-root ownership audit and reorganization
observed_implementation: All live path consumers, ownership contracts, documentation links, and checks use the relocated canonical paths.
The stale profile and resume fixtures were deleted; the live configuration example remains discoverable under docs/examples.
The local AI crate owns and embeds its model lock manifest.
Deleted working-tree paths are excluded before canonical structure classification.
In-memory SQLite test databases use one connection, preventing cross-test migration interference and preserving one database per pool.

commands.relevant_result: Locked dependency synchronization, environment diagnosis, harness validation, and baseline application smoke passed.
commands.caveat: The host Node.js and npm versions differ from the repository-owned pins.

commands.relevant_result: The complete local gate passed, including 817 script tests, 2,934 frontend tests, production and Storybook builds, 10 smoke journeys, architecture, security, documentation, and Rust workspace checks.
commands.caveat: The committed revision was reverified with the same full gate.

commands.relevant_result: The affected integration binary completed in 1.45 seconds with 22 passing and 1 intentionally ignored test after the single-connection correction.
commands.caveat: A regression first proved that the previous in-memory pool allowed 10 connections.

commands.relevant_result: Production, Storybook, runtime-test, and Rust build outputs were removed. Initial target cleanup reclaimed 184.5 GiB; final post-verification cleanup reclaimed 13.4 GiB.
commands.caveat: node_modules remains as the required local npm dependency installation.
